name: claude-code-agents
description: Codex delegates an existing approved plan to role-specialized Claude Code CLI agents using native --agents/--agent support.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex plans to Claude Code specialists
interface.longDescription: Codex keeps planning and review responsibility, then passes the existing approved plan to a local Claude Code CLI specialist loaded through native custom-agent flags.
defaultPrompt: 先制定计划，然后启用后端工程师智能体执行。
